raw.subject: Something I noticed about Erection Metal Works
raw.body:
Hi,

I noticed your post about dealing with storm damage to roofs in Arthur City. That's a tough situation to be in. I can imagine how stressful it must be to worry about leaks and expensive repairs later.

But I noticed you don't have your own website yet, which might mean you're missing out on some bookings and calls from people who need your help in an emergency like that.

I've been looking at your Facebook page and I thought I'd sketch out a quick idea for how a homepage could work for you. I included an emergency call to action, a list of your services, a map of your service area, and even a sticky phone bar to make it easy for people to get in touch. Take a look: https://damianbasilio.github.io/f/preview/erection-metal-works-arthur-city/

If you're interested in learning more about how a simple website could help your business, I'd be happy to discuss it with you further. One flat project fee for local businesses like yours can get you up and running quickly. Just reply to this email or give me a quick call to get started.
